entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., a cool season food legume grown in semi-arid regions

entities.name: NORTHEASTERN ETHIOPIA
entities.description: The semi-arid region where the study on chickpea productivity was conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Projected changes in climate affecting crop productivity and grain yield

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The measure of chickpea productivity used to assess the impact of climate change and management practices

entities.name: CROPGRO-CHICKPEA MODEL
entities.description: A simulation model used to assess climate change impacts and identify adaptation options for chickpea

entities.name: DSSAT
entities.description: Decision Support System for Agrotechnology Transfer, the software framework containing the CROPGRO model

entities.name: CO2 FERTILIZATION
entities.description: The process where increased atmospheric CO2 levels enhance plant growth and yield

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of additional water during specific growth stages to increase grain yield

entities.name: PLANTING DATE
entities.description: The timing of sowing the crop, evaluated as a management option to increase productivity

entities.name: EARLY SOWING
entities.description: The practice of planting the crop earlier to increase grain yield under present and future climate conditions

entities.name: RCPS
entities.description: Representative Concentration Pathways used to simulate different climate change scenarios

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development of the chickpea plant simulated by the crop model

entities.name: PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of biological events in the chickpea plant life cycle simulated by the crop model

entities.name: WATER BALANCE
entities.description: The simulation of water input and output in the soil for the chickpea crop

entities.name: FLOWER INITIATION
entities.description: A specific growth stage of chickpea where supplemental irrigation is applied

entities.name: POD SETTING
entities.description: A specific growth stage of chickpea where supplemental irrigation is applied

entities.name: CULTIVARS
entities.description: Different varieties of chickpea selected based on agroecology to increase productivity
